name: PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk
summary: PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk manufactures precast, ready mix concrete, and quarry. It operates through three segments: Precast, Ready Mix, and Construction Service. The company provides girders, spun and square piles, concrete barriers, U-gutter, U-ditch, box culverts, diaphragm wall, spider web foundation, CCSP and FCSP, pier head precast, electric pole, railway sleeper, sprigWP, RC pipe, and tetrapod products, as well as full, half, deck, and voided slabs. It also offers supporting services comprising engineering, installation, piling, construction, and post-tensioning services. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Jakarta Timur, Indonesia. PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk.
